mapper.select: SELECT t.AUTH_TMPL_NAME, t.SQL_STRING, a.AUTH_ID, a.CONTR_ID, a.AUTH_TMPL_ID, a.LAST_CHG_DT, u.USER_NAME AS last_chg_name FROM admin_sm_data_auth a LEFT JOIN admin_sm_user u ON a.LAST_CHG_USR = u.USER_ID LEFT JOIN admin_sm_res_contr c ON a.CONTR_ID = c.CONTR_ID LEFT JOIN admin_sm_data_auth_tmpl t ON a.AUTH_TMPL_ID = t.AUTH_TMPL_ID ${ew.customSqlSegment}
select a.auth_tmpl_id, t.auth_tmpl_name from admin_sm_data_auth a LEFT JOIN admin_sm_data_auth_tmpl t on a.auth_tmpl_id = t.auth_tmpl_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
